{{Quote|There hasn't been any legitimate business here in decades.|[[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]]|<ref name="Obsession">[[Obsession 1|''Obsession'' 1]]</ref>}}
'''New Coronet''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Swamp/Legends|swamp]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Trigalis/Legends|Trigalis]]. A rundown haven for criminal activity, the city was at one time a bustling trading post. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it was controlled by [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] assassin [[Xist]].

*[[Obsession 1|''Obsession'' 1]] {{1st}}
